channel.title: KillBait RSS Feed
channel.description: KillBait - News highlights delivered clearly and responsibly—no clickbait, no sensationalism

item.title: Many Americans Make Financial Sacrifices to Afford Health Care
item.description: A recent study from the West Health-Gallup Center on Healthcare in America shows that millions of Americans are forced to make difficult trade-offs to afford health care. More than 82 million people, ...

item.title: Middle East conflict triggers unprecedented disruption to global oil supply
item.description: Oil markets are facing a historic disruption as the ongoing war in Iran blocks tankers from transporting millions of barrels of crude each day. The International Energy Agency (IEA) has described the ...

item.title: Ultra Lotto 6/58 Jackpot Reaches Nearly P100 Million After No Winner
item.description: The Ultra Lotto 6/58 jackpot continues to grow as it nears the P100-million mark, according to the Philippine Charity Sweepstakes Office (PCSO). The latest draw, held on Tuesday, produced the winning ...

item.title: Seventy Years of Africa-China Partnership: Opportunities and Challenges Ahead
item.description: As Africa and China mark 70 years of diplomatic relations, the partnership is entering a new chapter with significant economic and social implications. China remains Africa's largest trading partner a...

item.title: CRTC eliminates extra fees for modifying or cancelling internet and cellphone plans
item.description: Canada's Radio-television and Telecommunications Commission (CRTC) has announced that telecom companies will no longer be allowed to charge fees for changing, cancelling, or activating internet and ce...

item.title: Jaipur man allegedly kills wife and daughter, remains with their bodies until police arrive
item.description: In a tragic incident in Jaipur, a 40-year-old man, Surjeet Singh, allegedly killed his wife Saroj Devi (35) and daughter Anshika (8) on Wednesday night. According to the police, the man reportedly att...

item.title: Easy Hoisin Chilli Beef Stir-Fry Recipe by Adam Liaw
item.description: Adam Liaw presents a quick and flavour-packed stir-fry recipe featuring hoisin chilli beef. Perfect for a midweek dinner, this dish combines thinly sliced topside beef marinated with cornstarch, sesam...

item.title: Eswatini takes in four additional third-country deportees from the United States
item.description: The government of Eswatini confirmed on Thursday that it had received four more third-country nationals deported from the United States, raising the total number of deportees received to at least 19. ...

item.title: Choosing Ideology Over Prosperity Keeps People Poor
item.description: This article talks about how people dey prefer ideology pass practical results even if e mean say citizens go suffer. Writer Charles Makakala dey use countries like South Korea, Japan, and Taiwan as e...

item.title: How to Compliment Your Boyfriend’s Instagram Pictures the Right Way
item.description: This article is all about helping you show love and appreciation to your boyfriend on Instagram without overdoing it. According to Faith Njogu, a certified marriage counsellor and relationship coach, ...

item.title: PNP intercepts nearly four kilos of shabu at NAIA cargo facility
item.description: MANILA, Philippines — Philippine authorities seized an abandoned parcel containing nearly four kilograms of shabu, valued at approximately P26.9 million, at the Ninoy Aquino International Airport (NAI...

item.title: Timaya Advises Men to Prioritise Having Children Over Marriage, Says Institution No Longer Works
item.description: Nigerian singer Timaya, whose real name na Inetimi Timaya Odon, don again talk him mind about marriage for one viral video wey dey circulate online. While him dey chill with fellow artists Peter Okoye...

item.title: Trump discusses Iran operations, tariffs, and women's sports policies during White House Women’s History Month event
item.description: During a White House event to mark Women’s History Month on March 12, 2026, President Donald Trump praised women, calling them powerful, important, and beautiful, while acknowledging potential controv...

item.title: East African Portland Cement Increases Blue Triangle Cement Price by KSh10 per Bag Due to Higher Raw Material Costs
item.description: East African Portland Cement Company, the maker of Blue Triangle cement, has announced a small price hike of KSh10 per 50kg bag for its Portland Pozzolanic Cement (CEM IV 32.5). This change took effec...

item.title: Man killed after crashing truck into Detroit synagogue during preschool hours
item.description: A man drove his truck into the Temple Israel Synagogue in a Detroit suburb while children were at the preschool inside. The assailant was killed during a confrontation with security personnel, one of ...

item.title: India engages with Iran for safe transit of its ships through Strait of Hormuz amid Gulf tensions
item.description: The Indian government confirmed that External Affairs Minister S. Jaishankar held discussions with his Iranian counterpart Seyed Araghchi on the safe passage of commercial ships through the Strait of ...

item.title: Hollywood’s changing beauty standards: When cosmetic enhancements and rapid weight loss reshape public perception
item.description: Hollywood’s long-standing beauty ideals, which emphasised looking polished, slim, and healthy, are shifting dramatically. Recent trends show a rise in both rapid weight loss through GLP-1 drugs like O...

item.title: Delhi Metro fan recognised for riding inaugural trains on all new routes
item.description: A dedicated Delhi Metro enthusiast has been felicitated for his remarkable feat of riding the first train on all the newly inaugurated corridors of the Delhi Metro network. His consistent passion for ...

item.title: US KC-135 refuelling aircraft crashes in western Iraq, no casualties from hostile fire
item.description: An American KC-135 refuelling aircraft went down in western Iraq on Thursday, while a second plane involved in the operation landed safely, the US military confirmed. The incident, reported by US Cent...

item.title: VP Sara Duterte speaks out against misuse of her minor son’s photo on social media
item.description: Vice President Sara Duterte publicly condemned the unauthorized use of her minor son's photograph in a social media post that circulated false information. The post quoted her son urging people to 'ta...
